pre_game.message: Hey, I'm D—nice to meet you. I'm here hoping to win some money back after a tough loss in the stock market, and I'm curious, what brings you to this game?
Hey D, nice to meet you—I'm H, and I'm here hoping to win some cash to cover a loan I've got coming up next month; that stock market hit sounds tough, what exactly went wrong for you?
Oh, man, I sunk 20k into a tech stock that looked solid but crashed hard overnight—timing was awful, you know? Anyway, that loan of yours sounds stressful; what kind of loan is it?
Oh, wow, losing 20k like that sucks—it's a personal loan I took for some family expenses, hoping to clear it without more stress; what are your plans if we win big here?
Yeah, it really stung, but if we win big here, I'd use the money to cover my losses and help out my family—feels like a fresh start; what about you, how would you spend your share?

Oh, that's awesome you're planning to help your family—I'd use my share to pay off that loan and take care of my loved ones, maybe even treat them to something nice; sounds like we're both in it for the right reasons!
Yeah, totally, H—it's reassuring we're both here for our families; what do your loved ones do that makes you want to treat them?
Oh, for sure, D—my family's always had my back, like pitching in for those expenses when times were tough, so I'd want to treat them to a fun family trip or just some quality time together.
That's really heartwarming, H—my family's been my rock through all this too, so I get it; what's your top pick for that family trip?
Oh, that's sweet, D—my top pick would be a trip to the Grand Canyon; it's this epic place we've always talked about hiking and making memories together.

That's awesome, H—the Grand Canyon does sound like an epic adventure for making memories; I've always wanted to take my family there too, so let's both crush it in this game and make our plans happen!
Yeah, D, that'd be amazing—fingers crossed we both get to the Grand Canyon with our families soon; let's give it our all in the game!
